summary: Route Liepin browser runs through fenced managed tabs created in the user's existing logged-in Chrome window.
rationale: The provider integration must reject missing or ambiguous Liepin host tabs without creating a new Chrome window, and each retry must start a fresh fenced browser scope. The existing workflow-site facade is moved unchanged out of the oversized site adapter so this feature does not increase that file's maintenance burden.
verification: uv run pytest -q tests/test_liepin_opencli_host_selection.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_retriever.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_boundary_wrappers.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_browser.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_browser_window_policy.py tests/test_liepin_search_workflow.py
uv run ruff check src/seektalent/providers/liepin tests/test_liepin_opencli_host_selection.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_retriever.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_boundary_wrappers.py
